title: A Message From Hurricoaster: Alternate Account
description:
ALTERNATE ACCOUNT - http://www.youtube.com/user/oldblindlady 

I've made a short video for y'all to enjoy. Not really enjoy, but watch with dismay and horror. I'm doing all I can to get ol' HHOW back, but in the meantime, subscribe to my alt account, as Hurricoaster isn't as invincible as he once believed.
